bookSourceComment: novalpie书源 - 需要登录使用。回归基线：登录态 + /reader WebView；章节定位 JS 已按当前 chapter id 优先匹配，避免预加载相邻章节时串章。
header:
<js>
var cookie = java.getCookie('https://novalpie.cc');
var token = '';
if (cookie) {
  var match = cookie.match(/auth_token=([^;]+)/);
  if (match) token = match[1];
}
JSON.stringify({
  'User-Agent': 'Mozilla/5.0 (Linux; Android 11) AppleWebKit/537.36',
  'Authorization': token ? 'Bearer ' + token : ''
});
</js>

ruleContent.webJs: var content = ''; var retry = 0; var chapterId = ''; try { var m = location.href.match(/[?&]chapter=(\d+)/) || location.href.match(/#chapter-(\d+)/) || location.href.match(/\/(\d+)(?:[?#]|$)/); chapterId = m ? m[1] : ''; } catch(e) {} while (!content && retry < 150) { var item = null; if (chapterId) item = document.querySelector('#chapter-' + chapterId + ', .chapter-item[data-chapter-id="' + chapterId + '"], .chapter-item[data-id="' + chapterId + '"]'); if (!item) item = document.querySelector('article.reader-content .chapter-item'); if (item) { var textEl = item.querySelector('div:not([class])'); if (textEl && textEl.innerHTML.length > 100) content = textEl.innerHTML; } if (!content) { java.sleep(200); retry++; } } content;
